framework: Schelling focal point detection + physical observables
design: 两层观测: 物理层(状态)+ 焦点层(转折). History in geopulse.db

history.est: 1-2 declining, CENTCOM 10000+ targets, mass salvo era OVER
history.note: Day 30. ★★★★ CENTCOM hit 10,000+ targets (NewsNation). Destroyed 19 ships + 1 submarine + ~2,000 targets (Wikipedia). 2/3 arms manufacturing destroyed (ToI). Israel killed IRGC Navy commander who ordered Hormuz closure (Fox). IRGC claims '220 coordinated attacks' but fire STILL 1-2 at a time (Cooper confirmed). Atlantic: 'massively asymmetrical war' — CENTCOM planning F-16/F-18 to clear remaining attack craft + minesweeping for strait. US dead: 21 total (13 KIA + 1 health + 6 crash), 290 wounded. Iran dead: 1,937 killed + 24,800 injured (AJE). Murkowski (R) drafting AUMF to force Congress vote. Trump approval 36% new low (Reuters/Ipsos). PATTERN: Volume collapse CONFIRMED + arms regeneration capacity destroyed + leadership decapitation. Source: NewsNation/CENTCOM/Atlantic/Reuters/AJE/Fox/Time/NYT

history.est: 1-2 declining, CENTCOM 10000+ targets, mass salvo era CONFIRMED over
history.note: Day 30. CENTCOM hit 10,000+ targets (NewsNation). 2/3 arms manufacturing destroyed (ToI). Israel killed IRGC Navy commander (Fox). IRGC volume STILL 1-2 at a time (Cooper confirmed). US dead: 21 total, 290+ wounded. Iran dead: 1,937+24,800 injured (AJE). 82nd Airborne 2-3K deploying. Trump April 6 deadline extended. PATTERN: Volume collapse + arms regeneration destroyed + leadership decapitation = IRGC residual-only. Source: CENTCOM/Fox/NewsNation/AJE

history.est: 1-2 declining, CENTCOM 10000+ targets, IDF sweeping EAST to Mashhad, IRGC Navy commander killed
history.note: Day 31. ★★★★ NEW: (1) ISW Mar 26: Combined force struck MASHHAD (northeastern-most strikes) — Khorasan Razavi Province, 14th Artesh AF + 5th GF Aviation Base at Mashhad Int'l Airport; (2) CENTCOM hit 10,000+ targets (NewsNation); (3) IDF killed IRGC Navy Commander Rear Admiral Tangsiri in Bandar Abbas — ordered Hormuz closure (Fox/ISW); (4) ★ IRGC lowered minimum recruitment age to 12 (ISW) = MANPOWER CRISIS signal; (5) Hezbollah claimed 73 attacks in 24h on Israel; (6) 2/3 arms manufacturing destroyed (ToI); (7) IDF 600+ ballistic sites struck; (8) IRGC volume STILL 1-2 at a time — mass salvo era CONFIRMED over; (9) US dead: 14 KIA + 6 crash + 1 health = 21 total, 290+ wounded; (10) WashPost: ~1,500 Iranian CIVILIANS killed; (11) Brent SURGED to .57 close (+4.22%); (12) Dow -800 entered CORRECTION. PATTERN: IRGC military degradation accelerating — recruitment age 12 = desperate. Combined force expanding strike envelope east. Source: ISW/CENTCOM/Fox/NewsNation/WashPost/CNBC

history.est: 1-2 declining, Prince Sultan AB hit (12 US injured), Arak+Bushehr nuclear sites struck
history.note: Day 32. ★★★★★ NUCLEAR ESCALATION + BASE BREACH: (1) IDF confirmed bombing Iran Arak heavy water reactor — 'key plutonium infrastructure' (ToI Mar 27); (2) Bushehr nuclear plant struck THIRD TIME Friday night (CNN); (3) 12 US troops injured at Prince Sultan Air Base Saudi Arabia, 2 SERIOUSLY (NYT) — most serious breach since war began; (4) 1 killed Tel Aviv from Iran missile Mar 28 (JPost); (5) Iran struck Gulf energy sites (Saudi/Qatar/Kuwait/UAE) after Israel struck South Pars gas field (AJE); (6) Reuters: US can only confirm ~1/3 of Iran missile arsenal destroyed (not 85%); (7) CENTCOM 10,000+ targets, 2/3 arms manufacturing destroyed; (8) ToI: US acknowledges war may extend past 4-6 week timeline; (9) Rubio at G7: expects operation 'weeks not months'; (10) Witkoff: negotiations 'this week'. IRGC volume STILL 1-2 at a time but NUCLEAR TARGET ESCALATION by IDF + BASE BREACH at Prince Sultan = new escalatory dimension. Source: ToI/CNN/NYT/JPost/AJE/Reuters/AP/CNBC

history.est: 1-2 declining, Houthis joined war, Prince Sultan AB breach, Arak+Bushehr nukes struck
history.note: Day 32. ★★★★★ HOUTHIS JOINED WAR Mar 28 — ballistic missile toward Israel, Beersheba sirens (Wikipedia). IDF struck Arak heavy water reactor 'key plutonium infrastructure' (ToI Mar 27) + Bushehr 3rd time (CNN). 12 US troops injured Prince Sultan AB Saudi, 2 SERIOUSLY (NYT) — most serious base breach. 1 killed Tel Aviv from Iran missile Mar 28 (JPost). CENTCOM 10,000+ targets, 2/3 arms manufacturing destroyed. IDF killed IRGC Navy Commander Tangsiri in Bandar Abbas (Fox/ISW). IRGC lowered recruitment age to 12 (ISW). Combined force struck MASHHAD — northeastern-most strikes. Reuters: US can only confirm ~1/3 missile arsenal destroyed (not 85%). Fire STILL 1-2 at a time — mass salvo era CONFIRMED over. US dead: 21 total (13 KIA + 1 health + 6 crash). NYT: at least 16 killed in Iranian attacks on Israel; 50+ killed in Gulf countries. Source: Wikipedia/NYT/ISW/CNN/ToI/Fox/JPost/Reuters/AJE

history.est: 1-2 declining, Prince Sultan AB hit (12 injured), Houthis launched first missile at Israel, Arak+Bushehr nukes struck
history.note: Day 32. ★★★★★ HOUTHIS FORMALLY ENTERED WAR Mar 28 — barrage of ballistic missiles toward Israel from Yemen (CNN/NYT/Reuters/AJE/AP). First Houthi attack on Israel since war began. IDF struck Arak heavy water reactor (ToI) + Bushehr 3rd time (CNN). 12 US troops injured Prince Sultan AB Saudi, 2 seriously (NYT). 1 killed Tel Aviv from Iran missile Mar 28 (JPost). CENTCOM 10,000+ targets, 2/3 arms mfg destroyed. IDF killed IRGC Navy Commander Tangsiri. IRGC recruitment age lowered to 12 (ISW). Reuters: US can only confirm ~1/3 missile arsenal destroyed. IRGC fire STILL 1-2 at a time — mass salvo era CONFIRMED over but GEOGRAPHIC+ACTOR EXPANSION: Houthis = INDEPENDENT capability node. Rubio at G7: weeks not months. Witkoff: negotiations this week. In-person talks possibly starting in Pakistan/Turkey. Source: CNN/NYT/Reuters/AP/AJE/ToI/ISW/JPost

history.est: 1-2 declining, Houthis entered war (INDEPENDENT), CENTCOM blocking underground tunnel access, Kuwait airport radar struck
history.note: Day 33. ★★★★★ HOUTHIS FORMALLY AT WAR — barrage of ballistic missiles at Israel from Yemen (NYT/Reuters/CNN/AJE/Guardian Mar 28). CENTCOM published footage Mar 27: struck bulldozers/loaders Iran used to try to clear debris and reopen tunnel entrances to underground missile facilities (ISW). Iran targeted 'Ukrainian anti-drone system depot' in Dubai UAE (Iran state TV). Drones struck Kuwait airport radar + Salalah port Oman. 12 US troops injured Prince Sultan AB Saudi, 2 seriously (NYT). Bushehr nuclear plant struck 3rd time overnight (AEOI confirmed, no material damage). IRGC fire STILL 1-2 at a time — mass salvo era CONFIRMED over. BUT: Houthis = INDEPENDENT capability node, NOT inheriting IRGC degradation. USS Gerald R. Ford docked Croatia for repairs + liberty (6th Fleet). PATTERN: IRGC volume collapsed + underground access denied, BUT new actor (Houthis) + geographic expansion (UAE/Oman/Kuwait). Source: ISW/NYT/Reuters/CNN/AJE/Guardian/CBS/AEOI

history.est: 1-2 declining (IRGC), Houthis ENTERED war 2 salvos, Hezbollah 600+ attacks/24h DOUBLING peak
history.note: Day 33. ★★★★★ MULTI-FRONT ESCALATION: (1) Houthis ENTERED WAR Mar 28 — 2 salvos of ballistic missiles at Israel from Yemen, first attack since war began (Reuters/CNN/NYT/AJE); (2) Hezbollah unleashed 600+ attacks on Israel in 24h — DOUBLING prior peak, likely coercion for ceasefire (JPost); (3) IRGC fire STILL 1-2 at a time — mass salvo era CONFIRMED over; (4) CENTCOM struck bulldozers/loaders Iran using to reopen tunnel entrances (ISW Mar 27); (5) Iran drones hit Kuwait airport radar + Salalah port Oman; (6) US KIA updated to 15 confirmed (Wikipedia) + 6 crash + 1 health = 22 total; (7) 300+ wounded (LA Times); (8) 12 US injured Prince Sultan AB Saudi, 2 seriously (NYT); (9) IDF struck Arak heavy water reactor + Bushehr 3rd time (nuclear escalation); (10) Reuters: US can only confirm ~1/3 missile arsenal destroyed. PATTERN: IRGC volume collapsed BUT 2 INDEPENDENT fronts activated — Houthis + Hezbollah surge. Each must be assessed as INDEPENDENT capability node, NOT inheriting IRGC degradation. Source: Reuters/CNN/NYT/AJE/JPost/ISW/LA Times/Wikipedia

history.est: 1-2 declining (IRGC), Houthis 2 salvos at Israel (INDEPENDENT), Hezbollah 600+/24h
history.note: Day 34. ★★★★★ ISW Mar 26: IDF 60+ jets, 150+ munitions on Parchin (Tehran Province). CENTCOM Mar 27: struck Iranian radar + bulldozers clearing tunnel entrances. IDF struck Mashhad (NE-most). 15 US KIA confirmed (Wikipedia). Houthis ENTERED WAR Mar 28 — barrage of ballistic missiles at Israel (WashPost/Reuters/CNN Mar 28). Hezbollah 600+ attacks/24h DOUBLING peak (JPost). CENTCOM 10,000+ targets. 2/3 arms manufacturing destroyed. IRGC Navy Commander Tangsiri killed (Fox/ISW). IRGC lowered recruitment age to 12 (ISW). Prince Sultan AB hit — 12 US injured, 2 seriously (NYT). Reuters: US can only confirm ~1/3 missile arsenal destroyed (not 85%). PATTERN: IRGC volume collapse CONFIRMED but 2 INDEPENDENT fronts activated — Houthis + Hezbollah surge. Each assessed as INDEPENDENT capability node. Source: ISW/CENTCOM/WashPost/Reuters/CNN/JPost/Fox/NYT

history.est: 1-2 declining (IRGC), Houthis 2ND WAVE cruise+drones at Israel, Iran new wave missiles Sunday
history.note: Day 34 PM. ★★★★★ MULTI-FRONT SUSTAINED: (1) Houthis SECOND WAVE — cruise missiles + drones at Israel targeting military sites (NYT/Guardian/HindustanTimes). Confirms INDEPENDENT SUSTAINED capability, not one-off; (2) Iran fired NEW WAVE of missiles at Israel on Sunday (The Hindu); (3) IRGC attacked aluminium smelters in Bahrain (ALBA, 2 wounded) + UAE (EGA) — ECONOMIC INFRASTRUCTURE targeting = NEW escalation dimension (AJE); (4) UAE air defenses ACTIVELY ENGAGING missiles+drones, sounds across country; (5) Kuwait intercepting attacks early Sunday; (6) Saudi intercepted 10 drones; (7) IRGC threatened US university campuses in Gulf (NYU Abu Dhabi, Texas A&M Qatar); (8) US/Israeli strikes hit Iran port city near Hormuz (ArabNews); (9) Iran found 120+ unexploded cluster bombs in southern province; (10) IDF soldier killed in southern Lebanon; (11) US Marines arriving in region; (12) Pentagon considering 10,000 MORE ground troops (WSJ) on top of 7,000 already en route = potential 17K ground force. IRGC volume STILL 1-2 at a time but Houthis 2nd wave + economic targeting + Gulf-wide strikes = WAR WIDENING across all dimensions. Source: NYT/Guardian/AJE/HindustanTimes/CBS/ArabNews/TheHindu/Reuters

history.est: 1-2 declining (IRGC), Houthis 2ND WAVE sustained, Iran new wave at Israel Sunday, UAE 16 missiles+42 drones/24h
history.note: Day 35. ★★★★★ MULTI-FRONT SUSTAINED: (1) Iran fired NEW wave missiles at Israel Sunday Mar 29 — missile fragment hit Beersheba factory, pesticide tank fire (AP/IDF); (2) UAE intercepted 16 missiles + 42 drones past 24h (MoD); (3) Houthis SUSTAINED 2nd wave cruise+drones at Israel (Guardian Mar 28) — CONFIRMED INDEPENDENT + SUSTAINED; (4) Hezbollah 600+ attacks/24h DOUBLING peak (JPost); (5) 4 Tehran locations struck Saturday (Fars); (6) Iran parliament speaker Qalibaf: 'Our firing continues. Our missiles are in place. Waiting for US troops on ground'; (7) 2,500 US Marines ARRIVED in region (AP Mar 29); (8) Pentagon considering 10,000 MORE ground troops (WSJ); (9) US KIA: 15 confirmed + 332 wounded (Wikipedia); (10) Iran: 2,076 killed + 26,500 injured (Health Ministry); HRANA: 3,461 killed; Hengaw: 6,900 killed. IRGC fire STILL 1-2 at a time — mass salvo era CONFIRMED over, BUT 3 INDEPENDENT fronts now active (IRGC residual + Houthis sustained + Hezbollah surge). Source: AP/IDF/UAE MoD/Guardian/Fars/WSJ/Wikipedia/JPost

history.est: 1-2 declining (IRGC), Houthis 2+ waves SUSTAINED, Hezbollah continuing, 3-front war
history.note: Day 37. ★★★★★ MULTI-FRONT SUSTAINED: (1) IRGC fire STILL 1-2 at a time — mass salvo era CONFIRMED over; (2) Houthis SUSTAINED 2+ waves cruise+drones at Israel (Guardian/WashPost/AJE Mar 28-29) — CONFIRMED INDEPENDENT + ONGOING; (3) Hezbollah CONTINUING — Netanyahu ordered EXPANSION of southern Lebanon operations Sunday (Reuters Mar 29); IDF soldier killed in south Lebanon Sunday; (4) 3,500 Marines+sailors arrived via USS Tripoli (31st MEU) — CENTCOM confirmed (AJE/AP/NYT Mar 29); (5) Pentagon preparing for 'weeks' of ground ops (Indian Express/WSJ); (6) Iran new wave missiles at Israel Sunday — fragment hit Beersheba factory; (7) UAE intercepted 16 missiles + 42 drones/24h; (8) CENTCOM 10,000+ targets struck; (9) Pakistan FM Dar: 'will host US-Iran talks in coming days' (AP Mar 30); (10) Trump Sunday: negotiations 'ongoing directly and indirectly', can 'see a deal soon' (ABC). Source: AJE/AP/Reuters/Guardian/WashPost/ABC/NYT/CNBC

history.est: ~3-4 mbd (5-6 ships/day + slight uptick + 8-10 tanker 'present')
history.note: Day 30. ★★★ TRANSIT UPDATE: (1) BBC Verify: ~100 ships Mar 1-20, daily traffic down ~95%; (2) Kpler: 138 ships March = 5-6/day; (3) Guardian Mar 26: 'slight uptick Thursday' but normal navigation NOT resumed; (4) Lloyd's: 'Tehran tollbooth' — ships paying ~$2M via Larak Island; (5) Iran FM Araghchi: 5 nations (CN/IN/RU/PK/IQ) open passage; (6) Trump: Iran sent 8-10 tankers as 'present'; (7) Thailand expanding beyond initial 5; (8) Atlantic: CENTCOM planning F-16/F-18 + minesweep ops for strait clearing; (9) US Energy Sec: Navy may escort by end March; (10) UNSC Res 2817 demands Iran cease attacks on neighbors. TWO-TIER transit regime solidifying. PATTERN: Physical transit improving (2.3→5-6/day) but still 95% below pre-crisis (17-20 mbd). Source: BBC/Kpler/Guardian/Lloyd's/Atlantic/Fox/India Today

history.est: ~3-4 mbd (5-6 ships/day + Guardian 'trickle' + Iran 2-tier regime)
history.note: Day 30. Guardian Mar 26: only 4 ships spotted (1 Panama tanker inbound, 2 cargo, 1 LPG outbound) — 'Tehran tollbooth'. BBC Verify: ~100 ships Mar 1-20. Kpler: 138 ships March = 5-6/day. Iran's 2-tier regime: 5 friendly nations (CN/IN/RU/PK/IQ) open, US/Israel/Gulf BLOCKED. Trump confirmed Iran sent 8-10 tankers as 'present'. Thailand expanding beyond initial 5. CENTCOM planning F-16/F-18 + minesweep for strait clearing. Still 95% below pre-crisis (17-20 mbd). Source: Guardian/BBC/Kpler/Reuters/Atlantic

history.est: ~3-4 mbd (5-6 ships/day, NYT: 3000 vessels waiting)

BBC: ~100 ships Mar 1-20. Iran two-tier regime: 5 friendly nations (CN/IN/RU/PK/IQ) open passage, US/Israel/Gulf BLOCKED. Trump confirmed 8-10 tanker 'present'. Thailand expanding beyond initial 5. Brent closed .57 — HIGHEST since 2022 on negotiation failure fears. Source: NYT/Guardian/BBC/Kpler/CNBC/Atlantic

history.est: ~3-4 mbd (5-6 ships/day, Iran blocked 2 Chinese ships, Oxford: impassable til May)
history.note: Day 32. ★★★ TRANSIT: (1) Oxford Economics: Hormuz remains impassable until May; (2) Wikipedia Mar 27: Iran blocked 2 Chinese ships — FRICTION in friendly-nation regime; (3) AJE: payments in yuan for some transits; (4) Kpler: 138 ships March = 5-6/day; (5) NYT: ~3,000 vessels waiting; (6) Guardian: 'Tehran tollbooth' — 4 ships spotted; (7) CBC: 'even if passable tomorrow, weeks before ships reach ports'; (8) Iran two-tier regime: 5 friendly nations open, US/Israel/Gulf BLOCKED; (9) Lloyd's: ships paying ~2M via Larak Island route; (10) CENTCOM planning F-16/F-18 + minesweep for strait clearing. PATTERN: Transit still 95% below pre-crisis. Iran blocking Chinese ships = cracks in friendly-nation framework. Source: Oxford/Wikipedia/AJE/Kpler/NYT/Guardian/CBC/Lloyd's

Oxford Economics: Hormuz impassable until May. Wikipedia Mar 27: Iran blocked 2 Chinese ships — FRICTION in friendly-nation regime. ~3,000 vessels WAITING (NYT). history.est: ~3-4 mbd (4-6 ships/day, USNI: 142 transits Mar 1-25 vs 2652 in 2025, Iran blocked 2 Chinese ships)
history.note: Day 32. ★★★ USNI News Mar 27: Lloyd's List Intelligence — 142 transits Mar 1-25 vs 2,652 same period 2025 = 94.6% decline. 4-6 ships/day. Guardian: 'Tehran tollbooth' — IRGC factions can still delay/seize despite official clearance. Iran blocked 2 Chinese ships (Wikipedia Mar 27) — FRICTION in friendly-nation regime. Greek-owned tanker crossed Mar 28 (GreekCityTimes). Oxford Economics: impassable until May. ~3,000 vessels waiting (NYT). Economist: US preparing military escort op if talks fail — 1 destroyer per 2 tankers, 14 destroyers in region but 6 guarding carriers. Iran two-tier regime: 5 friendly nations open, US/Israel/Gulf BLOCKED. Source: USNI/Lloyd's/Guardian/Oxford/NYT/Economist/GreekCityTimes

history.est: ~3-4 mbd (4-6 ships/day, IRGC reiterated CLOSURE, Thailand deal, Pakistan talks Sunday)
history.note: Day 33. ★★★ TRANSIT: (1) USNI/Lloyd's: 142 transits Mar 1-25 vs 2,652 same period 2025 = 94.6% decline; (2) CBS: IRGC Navy REITERATED 'Strait of Hormuz is CLOSED' — passage 'to and from' ports of allied/supporter nations of 'Zionist-American enemies' is PROHIBITED; (3) Thailand PM confirmed agreement with Iran for Thai oil vessel safe passage (The Hindu Mar 28) — expanding beyond initial 5 friendly nations; (4) Pakistan hosting talks SUNDAY with Saudi/Turkey/Egypt FMs on ending war (CBS/Guardian); (5) Oxford Economics: impassable until May; (6) ~3,000 vessels waiting (NYT); (7) Iran attacked Salalah port Oman + Kuwait airport radar with drones; (8) Zelenskyy in UAE: agreed security cooperation, Ukrainian anti-drone systems helping 5 Gulf countries; (9) CBS shipping experts: normalization requires end of hostilities + insurance reset. PATTERN: IRGC doubling down on closure rhetoric despite trickle improving. Pakistan multilateral talks = first concrete diplomatic framework. Source: USNI/CBS/Guardian/The Hindu/Oxford/NYT

fp1_china_action.label: 中国实质行动(唯一可行聚点注入)
fp1_china_action.status: VERBAL_MEDIATION + ENVOY_TOUR + COMMERCIAL + ABSENT_FROM_QUAD — Zhai Jun toured, China backing Pakistan mediation behind scenes, but no direct seat at table
fp1_china_action.findings: Day 37. China envoy Zhai Jun completed Gulf tour (SA/UAE/Bahrain/Kuwait/Egypt). CGTN Mar 27: 'shuttle mission across region from early to mid-March'. ChinaDaily Mar 26: 'takes Gulf security concerns seriously'. Wikipedia: Beijing dispatched envoys, evacuating nationals from Iran. China ABSENT from Pakistan Quad (SA/Turkey/Egypt only) BUT AJE Mar 29: 'China conveyed support to Tehran for Pakistan's mediation efforts and encouraged Iran to engage with diplomatic process' — global powers lining up behind regional initiative. China positioning as POST-CONFLICT stabilizer, not active mediator. fp1 threshold STILL NOT MET — verbal + commercial + behind-scenes encouragement only. Source: CGTN/ChinaDaily/Wikipedia/AJE

fp2_us_signal_inconsistency.label: 美方信号包内部矛盾(承诺解锁前导)
fp2_us_signal_inconsistency.status: CONTRADICTION AT ALL-TIME PEAK — Pakistan to HOST US-Iran direct talks + 3500 Marines arrived + Pentagon ground ops + nuclear strikes + Houthis + Netanyahu expanding Lebanon ops
fp2_us_signal_inconsistency.findings: Day 37. ★★★★★ fp2 PEAK SURPASSED: (1) Pakistan FM Dar: 'will host and facilitate meaningful US-Iran talks in coming days' (AP Mar 30); (2) Trump Sunday: negotiations 'ongoing directly and indirectly', can 'see a deal soon' (ABC); (3) BUT 3,500 Marines arrived USS Tripoli (CENTCOM Mar 29); (4) Pentagon preparing 'weeks' ground ops (WSJ/IndianExpress); (5) IDF struck Arak+Bushehr nuclear sites; (6) Houthis SUSTAINED 2+ waves at Israel (WashPost/Guardian); (7) Netanyahu ORDERED EXPANSION southern Lebanon ops Sunday (Reuters); (8) IDF soldier killed south Lebanon; (9) Qalibaf: 'missiles in place, waiting for US troops on ground'; (10) Iran insists halt strikes BEFORE negotiations. TWO TRACKS AT MAXIMUM DIVERGENCE: imminent direct talks via Pakistan vs largest military buildup since war began + 3-front expansion. Source: AP/ABC/Reuters/CENTCOM/WSJ/WashPost/Guardian

fp3_face_saving_framework.label: 面子工程原材料出现
fp3_face_saving_framework.status: PAKISTAN QUAD DAY 2 + DIRECT TALKS ANNOUNCED — Apr 6 deadline 7 days, Iran insists halt first, ForeignAffairs urging ceasefire
fp3_face_saving_framework.findings: Day 37. ★★★★★ fp3 MOST ACTIVE: (1) Pakistan FM Dar ANNOUNCED will host US-Iran direct talks 'in coming days' (AP Mar 30); (2) Quad Day 2 — SA/Turkey/Egypt FMs in Islamabad; (3) AJE: talks 'not designed to produce ceasefire itself' but build framework; (4) ForeignAffairs piece urging 'seriously negotiated ceasefire'; (5) Trump: 'see a deal soon'; (6) Iran rejected 15-point US plan but submitted OWN conditions; (7) Iran INSISTS: halt strikes BEFORE talks; (8) Apr 6 deadline = 7 DAYS; (9) Time: Pakistan announcement came as FMs met; (10) IDF CONTINUING nuclear+Lebanon strikes during talks = bad faith signal to Iran. ~35% ceasefire framework within 2 weeks (UP from 30-35% — Pakistan direct talks announcement is strongest diplomatic signal yet, offset by multi-front military expansion). Source: AP/AJE/Time/Reuters/ForeignAffairs

fp4_cost_threshold.label: 成本阈值的物理逼近
fp4_cost_threshold.findings: Day 37. ★★★★★ fp4 EVERY DIMENSION SURGING: (1) Brent USD116.12 (+3.2% Monday) — record monthly jump 59% (ToI), nearing early-war high USD119; WTI USD103.1 (+3.45%); (2) VIX 27-31 (93rd percentile, Yahoo); (3) Gold near USD4,500 safe haven; (4) S&P 500 ~5,580 down 4% YTD, Dow in CORRECTION; (5) Gas USD3.96/gal national (EIA), LA approaching USD6/gal (MyNewsLA), up 33%+ in 1 month, West Coast >USD5.25; (6) US KIA: 15 confirmed + 332 wounded; (7) Trump approval 36% new low; (8) War cost ~USD25B (CAP); (9) Senate blocked War Powers 53-47, House delayed til mid-April (Axios/DemocracyNow); (10) Rand Paul: Americans 'robbed of public debate', war already cost USD12B+ (Time Mar 25); (11) Houthis joining = cost ACCELERATING. Political sustainability CRITICAL — Brent 59% monthly jump = exceeds 1990 Gulf War gains (CNBC), gas approaching USD4 national psychological barrier. Source: CNBC/ToI/Yahoo/MyNewsLA/EIA/CAP/Time/Axios

noise_filter.rule: 按行为类型分类,不按人物分类
noise: 巴盖伊等发言人声明(言辞)
媒体'消息人士'报道(未验证)
signal: Trump签署行政令/军事命令(行动)
美军实际调兵/部署变化(行动)
IRGC实际攻击模式变化(行动)
中国实际经济/军事动作(行动)
noise_filter.key_distinction: 同一个人的言辞=噪声,行动=信号。Trump说'just for fun'=噪声。Trump命令打Kharg=信号。

pipeline_daily_checklist: 1. 物理层: 更新Q1(袭击频率) + Q2(通行量) + Q3(SPR释放)
2. 焦点层: 扫描fp1(中国动作) + fp2(美方矛盾) + fp3(退出框架) + fp4(成本阈值)
3. 噪声过滤: 新闻分类为action vs rhetoric
4. 结构性验证: 跑structural_verify检查盲区+停滞+链断裂
5. DAG更新: 只有物理层变化或焦点层信号触发才更新概率
